name: Standard
title: Bass Tuner
description: Free online bass tuner. Tune your 4-string bass to standard E-A-D-G using your microphone.

faq.question: What is standard bass tuning?
faq.answer: Standard 4-string bass tuning is E-A-D-G from the lowest (4th) string to the highest (1st) string, one octave lower than the bottom four guitar strings.

faq.question: How does an online bass tuner work?
faq.answer: Our bass tuner uses your device's microphone to detect the pitch of each string and shows whether you need to tune up or down.

faq.question: Is this bass tuner free?
faq.answer: Yes, EasyTuner is completely free to use with no registration required.
